question:
Will Galatasaray SK win on 2025-12-01?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for December 1, 2025
If Galatasaray SK wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://tff.org/

evidences.title: Live Odds and Betting Lines for Upcoming Games - OddsTrader
evidences.content: ## What Makes Odds Move? Sports betting odds move when sportsbooks react to new information, market pressure or changes in risk. Injuries and lineup changes Pitcher, goalie or quarterback news Weather Sharp betting action Public betting pressure Limit increases Rest, travel and schedule spots Suspensions or roster changes Major news close to game time Live-game momentum and scoring changes The opener shows where the market started. The current line shows where it is now. Comparing the two can help users understand whether they are betting before or after a major move. ## Using Picks, EV, Cover Probability and Bet Ratings [...] ## Odds Formats and Bet Types ### American Odds American odds are the most common format for U.S. bettors. Negative odds show how much you need to risk to win $100. Positive odds show how much you profit on a $100 bet. Example: -110 means you risk $110 to win $100. +150 means you risk $100 to win $150. ### Decimal Odds Decimal odds show the total return, including your stake. Example: 2.50 means a $100 bet returns $250 total: $100 stake plus $150 profit. ### Fractional Odds Fractional odds show profit compared to stake. Example: 9/2 means you win $9 for ev...
